[30;1m42732 | [0m[35m        //   captures = result.slice(1).map(maybeToString)[0m
[30;1m42733 | [0m[35m        // but for some reason `nativeSlice.call(result, 1, result.length)` (called in[0m
[30;1m42734 | [0m[35m        // the slice polyfill when slicing native arrays) "doesn't work" in safari 9 and[0m
[30;1m42735 | [0m[35m        // causes a crash (https://pastebin.com/N21QzeQA) when trying to debug it.[0m
[30;1m42736 | [0m[35m        for (var j = 1; j < result.length; j++) captures.push(maybeToString(result[j]));[0m
